name: Danny Ray Thompson
abstract: Danny Ray Thompson (October 1, 1947 – March 12, 2020) was an American jazz musician. He played baritone saxophone with the Sun Ra Arkestra and managed the band for a period of time.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Sun Ra and His Space Arkestra

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: Danny Thompson, by the way, was kind of like the head salesman for Sun Ra’s record label. He was also the baritone player and kind of the point man for a lot of things with the band. Very nice guy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe and Christian Goodwillie, via Zoom, June 30, 2021
